fields.name: animal_project_code
fields.description: Animal project code; predefined options. Check your dashboard (https://www.lifewatch.be/etn/dashboard); new project names can only be added by administrators

fields.name: tag_serial_number
fields.description: Tag serial number. If your animal is double tagged, add the serial numbers of both tags, separated by a comma.

fields.name: scientific_name
fields.description: Scientific name of animal that carries the tag.

fields.name: common_name
fields.description: The species' common English name.

fields.name: aphia_id
fields.description: The Aphia ID linked to the scientific name. The Aphia ID can be found at http://www.marinespecies.org/aphia.php?p=webservice

fields.name: animal_label
fields.description: Identification code that uniquely identifies each animal, as specified by the researcher.

fields.name: animal_nickname
fields.description: Nickname given to the tagged animal.

fields.name: tagger
fields.description: Person conducting tagging

fields.name: capture_date_time
fields.description: Date and time that animal was caught, in 24h UTC. Datetime fields should follow the ISO-8601 format.

fields.name: capture_location
fields.description: Name of capture location. Please refer to a specific nearby point of land, town, island, or body of water that uniquely identifies this tagging location. Okay to leave blank if same as release location.

fields.name: capture_latitude
fields.description: Latitude of capture location. Leave blank if same as release location. Note: in the southern hemisphere all latitudes must be negative.

fields.name: capture_longitude
fields.description: Longitude of capture location. Leave blank if same as release location. Note: in the western hemisphere all longitudes must be negative.

fields.name: capture_method
fields.description: Name of the method and materials used to capture animal.

fields.name: capture_depth
fields.description: Water depth at which the animal was caught.

fields.name: capture_temperature_change
fields.description: Difference between water temperature of the system where the fish was caught and the water temperature of the holding reservoir.

fields.name: release_date_time
fields.description: Date and time that tagged animal was released, in UTC.

fields.name: release_location
fields.description: Name of release location. Please refer to a specific nearby point of land, town, island, or body of water that uniquely identifies this tagging location.

fields.name: release_latitude
fields.description: Latitude of release location. Note: in the southern hemisphere all latitudes must be negative.

fields.name: release_longitude
fields.description: Longitude of release location. Note: in the western hemisphere all longitudes must be negative.

fields.name: recapture_date_time
fields.description: If applicable, date of recapture of the tagged animal.

fields.name: length1_type
fields.description: Specify type of length recorded (e.g. hood length, fork length, standard length, etc.).

fields.name: length1
fields.description: Length of animal that carries tag, depending on 'Length type', in units specified in 'Length units'.

fields.name: length1_unit
fields.description: Units of length.

fields.name: length2_type
fields.description: Specify type of secondary size measurement (e.g. width).

fields.name: length2
fields.description: Secondary length measurement, depending on 'Length2 type', in units specified in 'Length2 units'.

fields.name: length2_unit
fields.description: Units of secondary length.

fields.name: length3_type
fields.description: Specify type of tertiary size measurement (e.g. width).

fields.name: length3
fields.description: Tertiary length measurement, depending on 'Length3 type', in units specified in 'Length3 units'.

fields.name: length3_unit
fields.description: Units of tertiary length.

fields.name: length4_type
fields.description: Specify type of quaternary size measurement (e.g. width).

fields.name: length4
fields.description: Quaternary length measurement, depending on 'Length4 type', in units specified in 'Length4 units'.

fields.name: length4_unit
fields.description: Units of quaternary length.

fields.name: weight
fields.description: Weight of animal that carries tag, in units specified in 'Weight units'.

fields.name: weight_unit
fields.description: Units of weight.

fields.name: age
fields.description: Age of animal that carries tag, the units are specified in 'Age units'.

fields.name: age_unit
fields.description: Units of age.

fields.name: sex
fields.description: Sex of animal. "M" or "F". Can enter unknown ("U").

fields.name: life_stage
fields.description: Life stage of animal. This will depend on the species being studied and can be a standard code used for that species, a description, or both.

fields.name: wild_or_hatchery
fields.description: Origin of animal that carries the tag.  Enter "wild", "hatchery" or "unknown".

fields.name: stock
fields.description: Water body of origin. Can enter unknown or not applicable.

fields.name: surgery_date_time
fields.description: Date that surgery was conducted. Date fields should follow the ISO-8601 format.

fields.name: surgery_location
fields.description: Short name of surgery location (i.e. hatchery name).

fields.name: surgery_latitude
fields.description: Latitude of surgery location. Note: in the southern hemisphere all latitudes must be negative.

fields.name: surgery_longitude
fields.description: Longitude of surgery location. Note: in the western hemisphere all longitudes must be negative.

fields.name: treatment_type
fields.description: Contains a designation of treatment group as appropriate for the particular study. Researchers will have to contact the authors directly for definitions. Try to make these as clear as possible (e.g. use Control instead of C, Lake release instead of Lake).

fields.name: tagging_type
fields.description: Indicates how tag was attached to animal (e.g. "internal", "external", "oral", "gastric", "subcutaneous", etc.).

fields.name: tagging_methodology
fields.description: Describe method and materials used to attach tag to animal.
fields.example: inserted into abdominal cavity through midventral line incision, closed using 2 polydioxanone monofilament sutures.

fields.name: dna_sample
fields.description: Indicates whether the animal that carries the acoustic tag is also sampled for DNA.

fields.name: sedative
fields.description: Name of sedative used if applicable.

fields.name: sedative_concentration
fields.description: Concentration of sedative.

fields.name: anaesthetic
fields.description: Name of anaesthetic used if applicable.

fields.name: buffer
fields.description: Name of buffer used if applicable.

fields.name: anaesthetic_concentration
fields.description: Concentration of anaesthetic.

fields.name: buffer_concentration_in_anaesthetic
fields.description: Concentration of buffer in anaesthetic.

fields.name: anaesthetic_concentration_in_recirculation
fields.description: Concentration of anaesthetic in recirculation bath.

fields.name: buffer_concentration_in_recirculation
fields.description: Concentration of buffer in recirculation bath.

fields.name: dissolved_oxygen
fields.description: This measure is the lowest oxygen level the fish will experience during the surgery.

fields.name: pre_surgery_holding_period
fields.description: Time that animal is held prior to surgery.

fields.name: post_surgery_holding_period
fields.description: Time the animal is held after surgery until release.

fields.name: holding_temperature
fields.description: This measure is the highest or lowest water bath temperature the fish will experience during holding (depends if surgical water temperatures are increasing or decreasing relative to initial water temperature reading). For example, if tagging is being cond

fields.name: comments
fields.description: Any comments deemed to have scientific relevance by the tagger.

fields.name: tag_type
fields.description: Type of tag attached to animal. Fixed options: sensor-tag, id-tag, combined-tag (=sensor-tag + id-tag)

fields.name: tag_subtype
fields.description: Type of acoustic tag. Predefined options: "animal", "built-in tag", "sentinel tag" or "range tag".

fields.name: sensor_type
fields.description: Type of sensor in the tag device. Predefined options: P = pressure, T = temperature, A = acceleration, M(A) = Mortality(Alive), M(D) = Mortality(Dead), EMF, Mo = Motion

fields.name: manufacturer
fields.description: Name of tag manufacturer. Predefined options: "INNOVASEA", "CHELONIA", "LOTEK", "STAR-ODDI","THELMA BIOTEL".

fields.name: model
fields.description: Predefined options. Needs to match tags in 'KNOWN MODELS'. Send an email to info@europeantrackingnetwork.org if your model is missing from the list (currently all set to 'NOT YET SET')

fields.name: frequency
fields.description: Frequency (in Hz) at which the tag emits a signal.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current status of the tag. Three options: "available" when uploading the tags. Will automatically be set to "active" when animals get uploaded. Will automatically be set to "ended" when the battery estimated lifetime  is reached

fields.name: activation_date
fields.description: Date and time the tag was activated, in UTC

fields.name: battery_estimated_life
fields.description: Estimated duration of time during which the tag will be transmitting.

fields.name: battery_estimated_end_date
fields.description: Estimated date at which tag will stop transmitting.  Date fields should follow the ISO-8601 format.

fields.name: sensor_slope
fields.description: Raw value of slope, as used for sensor calibration.

fields.name: sensor_intercept
fields.description: Raw value of intercept, as used for sensor calibration.

fields.name: sensor_range
fields.description: Maximum range of sensor.

fields.name: sensor_unit
fields.description: Unit of the sensor

fields.name: sensor_transmit_ratio
fields.description: Ratio of transmission between sensors present. If for example both a T and P sensor are present and T transmits twice as often as P, the range is 2 to 1.

fields.name: accelerometer_algorithm
fields.description: There are two possible modes of operation of the accelerometer algorithm: Activity or Tailbeat.

fields.name: accelerometer_samples_per_second
fields.description: Number of acceleration samples taken on each axis per second. Sampling rate can be 5 Hertz (5 measurements/s) or 10  Hertz (10 measurements/s).

fields.name: owner_organization
fields.description: Group owner of the tag. Use the exact group name to which the tag belongs.

fields.name: owner_pi
fields.description: First and last name of the Principal Investigator for the project.

fields.name: financing_project
fields.description: Tag financing project.

fields.name: step1_min_delay
fields.description: Minimum delay, in seconds, between the pings transmitted by the tag for step 1.

fields.name: step1_max_delay
fields.description: Maximum delay, in seconds, between the pings transmitted by the tag for step 1.

fields.name: step1_power
fields.description: Acoustic power level. "H" or "L".

fields.name: step1_duration
fields.description: Duration of step 1, in days

fields.name: step1_acceleration_duration
fields.description: Time window over which acceleration is sampled (in seconds).

fields.name: step2_min_delay
fields.description: Minimum delay between the pings transmitted by the tag for step 2.

fields.name: step2_max_delay
fields.description: Maximum delay between the pings transmitted by the tag for step 2.

fields.name: step2_power
fields.description: Acoustic power level. "H" or "L".

fields.name: step2_duration
fields.description: Duration of step 2.

fields.name: step2_acceleration_duration
fields.description: Time window over which acceleration is sampled (in seconds).

fields.name: step3_min_delay
fields.description: Minimum delay between the pings transmitted by the tag for step 3.

fields.name: step3_max_delay
fields.description: Maximum delay between the pings transmitted by the tag for step 3.

fields.name: step3_power
fields.description: Acoustic power level. "H" or "L".

fields.name: step3_duration
fields.description: Duration of step 3.

fields.name: step3_acceleration_duration
fields.description: Time window over which acceleration is sampled (in seconds).

fields.name: step4_min_delay
fields.description: Minimum delay between the pings transmitted by the tag for step 4.

fields.name: step4_max_delay
fields.description: Maximum delay between the pings transmitted by the tag for step 4.

fields.name: step4_power
fields.description: Acoustic power level. "H" or "L".

fields.name: step4_duration
fields.description: Duration of step 4.

fields.name: step4_acceleration_duration
fields.description: Time window over which acceleration is sampled (in seconds).

fields.name: date_time
fields.description: Date and time at which the tagged animal was detected at the receiver. Information from detection file.

fields.name: animal_project_code
fields.description: Code of the animal project linked to this detection.

fields.name: animal_id
fields.description: Foreign Key linked to the Animal_ID

fields.name: scientific_name
fields.description: Scientific name of the animal that carries the tag.

fields.name: acoustic_project_code
fields.description: Code of the network project linked to this detection.

fields.name: receiver_id
fields.description: Receiver name, composed of 'Model number'-'Serial number'. Info comes from 'Detection_table'.

fields.name: station_name
fields.description: Name of receiver station. The station name refers to a unique location, related to a specific latitude and longitude.

fields.name: deploy_latitude
fields.description: Latitude of the location of the deployment.

fields.name: deploy_longitude
fields.description: Longitude of the location of the deployment.

fields.name: sensor_value
fields.description: Value recorded by the tag sensor.

fields.name: sensor_unit
fields.description: Unit of measured sensor value.

fields.name: sensor2_value
fields.description: Value recorded by secondary tag sensor.

fields.name: sensor2_unit
fields.description: Unit of measured secondary sensor value.

fields.name: signal_to_noise_ratio
fields.description: Signal-to-noise ratio. This is the difference between the background noise level and the signal level. Info comes from detection file.

fields.name: source_file
fields.description: Name of the detection file.

fields.name: qc_flag
fields.description: Identifies whether there are quality check issues for the given detection.

fields.name: deployment_id
fields.description: Foreign key linked to the deployment information

fields.name: receiver_id
fields.description: Receiver ID linked to the deployment. Composed by 'Model number'-'Serial number'.

fields.name: station_name
fields.description: Name of the station where the deployment of the receiver takes place. Related to a specific latitude and longitude.

fields.name: station_description
fields.description: Name of receiver location. The location name serves as an additional descriptive name of the receiver station. It can refer to a specific nearby point of land, town, island, or body of water that identifies this receiver location.

fields.name: station_manager
fields.description: Name of the person or institution managing the location.

fields.name: deploy_date_time
fields.description: Date and time that the equipment was deployed, in 24-hour UTC. Corresponds to the time of the captured waypoint. Datetime fields should follow the ISO-8601 format (e.g. 2017-01-01T12:07:23Z)

fields.name: deploy_latitude
fields.description: Latitude of the actual deployment location, in decimal degrees. Note: in the southern hemisphere all latitudes must be negative.

fields.name: deploy_longitude
fields.description: Longitude of the actual deployment location, in decimal degrees. Note: in the western hemisphere all longitudes must be negative.

fields.name: intended_latitude
fields.description: Latitude of the intended deployment location, in decimal degrees. Note: in the southern hemisphere all latitudes must be negative.

fields.name: intended_longitude
fields.description: Longitude of the intended deployment location, in decimal degrees. Note: in the western hemisphere all longitudes must be negative.

fields.name: mooring_type
fields.description: Type of mooring to which the receiver is attached. Predefined options: "surface-buoy", "surface-wind-turbine" or "bottom-mooring".

fields.name: bottom_depth
fields.description: Depth at deployment location as recorded by the vessel's depth sounder.

fields.name: riser_length
fields.description: Length from the anchor to the topmost float or structure of the mooring assembly.

fields.name: deploy_depth
fields.description: Depth of the instrument.

fields.name: battery_installation_date
fields.description: Date when the receiver was fitted with fresh batteries.

fields.name: battery_estimated_end_date
fields.description: Estimated date at which receiver will stop recording. This date is calculated automatically from (Deployments/Battery install date) and (Receivers/Expected battery life).

fields.name: recover_date_time
fields.description: Date and time that the equipment was recovered, in 24-hour UTC. ISO-8601 format.

fields.name: recover_latitude
fields.description: Latitude where the equipment was recovered, in decimal degrees. Unless it is found a substantial distance from its expected location, this can be left blank. For failed recovery attempts, use this field to record the central latitude of the recovery sea.

fields.name: recover_longitude
fields.description: Longitude where the equipment was recovered, in decimal degrees. Unless it is found a substantial distance from its expected location, this can be left blank. For failed recovery attempts, use this field to record the central longitude of the recovery sea

fields.name: download_date_time
fields.description: Date and time that data were downloaded, in 24-hour UTC.

fields.name: download_file_name
fields.description: Were data downloaded? Yes or no. If no, please add comment.

fields.name: sync_date_time
fields.description: Date and time when a receiver's clock is synchronized to correct UTC, in 24-hour UTC. ISO-8601 format.

fields.name: time_drift
fields.description: Displayed difference in time between the instrument's clock and correct UTC. Note: This must be recorded in the field for Vemco model VR3 receivers when there are no detections because no log file is created under those circumstances.

fields.name: ar_battery_installation_date
fields.description: Date when the acoustic release was fitted with fresh batteries, in 24-hour UTC format.

fields.name: ar_confirm
fields.description: Did the acoustic release report a confirmed release? Yes or no.

fields.name: transmit_profile
fields.description: Predefined options: "Range test(random)", "Range test(90s)" or "Sync".

fields.name: transmit_power_output
fields.description: Predefined options: "Low", "Medium", "High", "Very high".

fields.name: log_temperature_stats_period
fields.description: Time interval between the recording of temperature statistic, as calculated from sample values.

fields.name: log_temperature_sample_period
fields.description: Time interval between the sample values of temperature. This field is specific to VR2AR receivers. By default, sample values are not logged on the VR2AR receivers.

fields.name: log_tilt_sample_period
fields.description: Time interval between the sample values of tilt. This field is specific to VR2AR receivers.

fields.name: log_noise_stats_period
fields.description: Time interval between the recording of noise statistic, as calculated from sample values.

fields.name: log_noise_sample_period
fields.description: Time interval between the sample values of noise. This field is specific to VR2AR receivers. By default, sample values are not logged on the VR2AR receivers.

fields.name: log_depth_stats_period
fields.description: Time interval between the recording of depth statistic, as calculated from sample values.

fields.name: log_depth_sample_period
fields.description: Time interval between the sample values of depth. This field is specific to VR2AR receivers. By default, sample values are not logged on the VR2AR receivers.

fields.name: comments
fields.description: Any comments deemed to have scientific relevance by the tagger.

fields.name: receiver_id
fields.description: The receiver name is composed of 'Model number'-'Serial number'.

fields.name: manufacturer
fields.description: Name of receiver manufacturer. Predefined options: "INNOVASEA", "CHELONIA", "LOTEK" or "THELMA BIOTEL". Check KNOWN MODELS

fields.name: receiver_model
fields.description: Predefined options. Needs to match receiver in 'KNOWN MODELS'. Send an email to info@europeantrackingnetwork.org if your model is missing from the list

fields.name: receiver_serial_number
fields.description: Serial number assigned by receiver manufacturer to uniquely identify receiver.

fields.name: modem_address
fields.description: This field is mandatory for Vemco VR4UWM receivers. It is a three-digit code from 001 to 249, as provided by the manufacturer, that is used to communicate with the Benthos modem. For VR4 receivers manufactured prior to September 2011, the modem address is

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current status of receiver. Predefined options: "Available" when uploading the receivers; will automatically be set to "Active" when deployments for the receiver get uploaded; need to be manually set when: "Broken", "Lost" or "Returned to manufacturer".

fields.name: battery_estimated_life
fields.description: Expected duration for which the battery will provide adequate power for proper functioning of the receiver.

fields.name: owner_organization
fields.description: Affiliation of the Principal Investigator for the project.

fields.name: financing_project
fields.description: Receiver financing project.

fields.name: built_in_acoustic_tag_id
fields.description: Tag full ID of the receiver's built in tag.

fields.name: ar_model
fields.description: Model number of the acoustic release as provided by the manufacturer.

fields.name: ar_serial_number
fields.description: Serial number of the acoustic release as provided by the manufacturer.

fields.name: ar_battery_estimated_life
fields.description: Expected duration for which the battery will provide adequate power for proper functioning of the acoustic release.

fields.name: ar_voltage_at_deploy
fields.description: Voltage reported by an acoustic release as near as possible to the time of deployment.

fields.name: ar_interrogate_code
fields.description: Interrogate code or code range command of the release. Used to ping a specific release, rather than send a general ping to all releases in the vicinity.

fields.name: ar_receive_frequency
fields.description: Interrogate or receive frequency at which the release receives data.

fields.name: ar_reply_frequency
fields.description: Frequency at which the release sends data.

fields.name: ar_ping_rate
fields.description: Ping rate of the release.

fields.name: ar_enable_code_address
fields.description: Code used to enable the release; differs among release models.

fields.name: ar_release_code
fields.description: Code used to release the release; differs among release models.

fields.name: ar_disable_code
fields.description: Code used to disable the release.

fields.name: ar_tilt_code
fields.description: Tilt code of the release.

fields.name: ar_tilt_after_deploy
fields.description: Tilt after deploy of receiver
